title: Creating an Agent Avatar Description
scenario: Write a short description of a conversational AI agent's avatar that is no more than 20 words. The description should be written in a playful tone and should include the agent's name and a brief description of its appearance.
constraints: Must be no more than 20 words
Must be written in a playful tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 20-word limit and is written in a playful tone.
